blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Native Windows GUI surface requires manual Task Manager CPU measurement - no automated tool available

testingSurfaceAnalysis.surfaceCompatibility: incompatible - neither tool works for native Windows GUI

notes: All assertions in validation-contract.md specify Tool: manual. The native Windows GUI surface cannot be tested with available automated tools (agent-browser, tuistory). This is a known constraint documented in .factory/library/user-testing.md. Manual user testing by a human is required for all VAL-GUI assertions.
